ai_summary: This document is a routine compliance filing from Airolam Limited to the National Stock Exchange, confirming adherence to Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent certifies that all securities dematerialisation requests were processed correctly, physical certificates cancelled, and records updated within prescribed timelines. This demonstrates sound corporate governance and there are no apparent red flags regarding investor services or regulatory compliance.
